title: Become an AI Generalist
description: Learn the fundamentals of artificial intelligence, prompting, and how to leverage LLMs for real-world tasks.
overview: A perfect starting point for future innovators. We build 5 AI-assisted apps while introducing core concepts like natural language processing, effective prompting, and AI tool orchestration.

title: The Art of Vibe Coding
description: Master the intuitive flow of prompting, generating code, and debugging visually with AI-assisted IDEs.
overview: Transition natively from traditional coding to AI-driven generation. We cover context-window management, architecture prompting, and iterative debugging to build fully functional software through natural language.

title: Build AI Workflows & Automation
description: Assemble hands-off automation pipelines connecting multiple tools and AI agents to save hours of work.
overview: Master the absolute basics of no-code automation and API wrappers using modern browser technologies. Everything culminates in students deploying their own fully automated AI content or operational system.

title: Connecting AI Core Products
description: Launch complete SaaS products by integrating powerful AI models into sophisticated tech stacks.
overview: Before touching physical boards or infrastructure, simulate intelligent apps using robust foundational models. We build products featuring vision, voice, and RAG architectures in an entirely cloud-native ecosystem.

title: Coding Foundation
description: Establish a bulletproof understanding of coding concepts through entirely self-paced micro-lessons.
overview: Designed for maximum autonomy, this course lets you grasp core computer science logic precisely at your own speed using interactive, foundational puzzles.
